ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, cryptocurrency) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument (e.g., software, banking, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the market is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market is denominated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the market (e.g., North America, Europe, Asia) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., historical, real-time) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the data feed */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed (e.g., CSV, JSON, Avro) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the data point */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the data point */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the data point */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., trend, momentum, volatility) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the technical indicator (e.g., period, level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical indicator */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "signal" TEXT /* Signal generated by the technical indicator (e.g., buy, sell, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES technical_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, list) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard that the chart is on */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being charted */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technical indicator being used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the chart (e.g., color, size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_data" (
  "chart_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart data point */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point on the chart */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point on the chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_data_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being traded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trade data point */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical trade data point */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the historical trade data point */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the historical trade data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_news" (
  "instrument_news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_news_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
